label: 2026-06-05 close
title: Daily FI Market Tape | 2026-06-05 close
summary: 6 月 5 日 UST bear flattening：2Y 4.17% 日升 12bp、10Y 4.55% 日升 8bp、30Y 5.01%，2s10s 壓平至 38bp。
May payrolls +172k 遠高於約 +80k 共識，失業率 4.3%，市場完全定價年底 25bp 升息並把 10 月機率推至約 60%。
配置偏向現金與短中段 carry；5Y-10Y 只在 CPI / 油價確認後分批回補，信用留 IG quality，台幣海外債 ETF 需把 USD/TWD 正向換算與利率損失分開。

headline.primary: 就業重熱把 Fed 拉回升息尾端，UST bear flattening 壓住所有長存續期資產
headline.secondary: 2Y 4.17%、10Y 4.55%、NDX -4.8%、SOX -10.3%；本周 CPI 是二次賣債或 belly 修復的分水嶺。

sections.title: 一、美債收盤與曲線變化
sections.takeaway: UST 是就業強勁後的 bear flattening：前端重估升息風險，長端也被油價與供給拖住。
paragraphs: 6 月 5 日美債收盤是典型 payrolls-driven bear flattening。官方 CMT 顯示 2Y 收 4.17%、日升 12bp，5Y 收 4.29%、日升 11bp，10Y 收 4.55%、日升 8bp，20Y 收 5.03%、30Y 收 5.01%。2s10s 從 42bp 收斂到 38bp，5s30s 從 79bp 收斂到 72bp，代表市場先把升息 optionality 壓回政策敏感段，再由 term premium 把長端一起往上帶。
周/月錨點說明這不是單日雜訊。2Y 相對 5 月 29 日升 19bp、相對 5 月 5 日升 24bp；5Y 周升 16bp、月升 21bp；10Y 周升 10bp、月升 12bp。前一日 6 月 4 日的 relief 已被完全反轉，10Y 4.55% 與 30Y 5.01% 同時出現，對所有長存續期資產都是折現率重新校準。
曲線訊號比絕對利率更重要。2s10s 日內壓平 4bp、周內壓平 9bp、月內壓平 12bp，說明就業數據把市場從「年底仍可能降息」帶回「Fed 下一步可能是升息」。5s30s 日內壓平 7bp，顯示 belly 受政策路徑衝擊最大；但 30Y 仍在 5% 上方，term premium、財政供給與 MBS hedge 需求沒有消失。
這次宏觀觸發很完整：非農新增 172k，高於約 80k 共識，失業率 4.3% 符合預期，4 月上修至 179k，三個月就業動能為兩年多來最強。Actual / expected / prior 的組合代表勞動市場不是只少裁員，而是重新有招聘擴張；因此 2Y 不能只反映按兵不動，還必須把 10 月或 12 月升息 tail risk 納入價格。
油價在周五收盤雖然仍回落，Brent 93.09 美元、日跌 2.0%，WTI 90.54 美元、日跌 2.7%，但周末伊朗向以色列發射飛彈後，Brent 亞洲盤回到約 95.60 美元。這讓長端無法把周五的能源 relief 完全保留下來，因為 CPI swap 已經指向本周年增約 4.3% 的通膨讀數。

配置上不能把 10Y 4.55% 自動視為買點。若 CPI 接近 4.3% 或 FOMC 聲明移除任何 easing bias，2Y-5Y 還有二次 repricing；若 10Y 能在 4.60% 附近不破且 SOX/NDX 不再擴大跌幅，才是分批回補 belly duration 的條件。超長端則要等 30Y 重新站回 5.05% 下方且 auction/supply concession 可控。

sections.title: 二、美債走勢解讀
sections.takeaway: Fed reaction function 從降息等待改為通膨可信度測試，belly 比 long end 更有交易價值。
paragraphs: Fed pricing 的核心變化是 probability distribution 右移。就業公布後，利率 swaps 已完全定價年底前 25bp 升息，且 10 月升息機率約 60%；這與前一周仍討論降息時點的語境完全不同。Warsh 6 月 16-17 的第一場會議若想維持抗通膨可信度，很難保留偏鴿語句，這是 2Y 突破 4.15% 的直接原因。
宏觀傳導對 front end、belly、long end 不同。Front end 對 Fed 語句與 CPI actual 最敏感；belly 同時吃就業動能、實質利率與風險資產去槓桿；long end 則在 5% 附近受到保險、養老金與海外買盤支撐，但供給與油價會讓 rally 速度變慢。因此策略應偏向 5Y-10Y 梯形承接，而不是一次把 30Y 補滿。
Goldman 把今年降息預期移除，BNP Paribas 轉向三次升息預測，Citi 仍維持三次降息但已變成少數派。這種 sell-side 分歧本身就會提高前端 volatility，因為每一個 CPI、PPI、claims 和 payrolls 都會迫使模型重新校準。對交易而言，現在不是押單一方向，而是用 4.45%-4.65% 的 10Y range 管理風險。
實質利率上行也解釋了黃金與股票同跌。黃金收 4,337.10 美元、日跌 3.1%，DXY 收 100.07、日升 0.7%，代表市場不是純粹買避險，而是在重新要求 real yield compensation。這種組合對長存續期成長股與長天期 IG 都不友善，對短天期 carry 與浮動利率結構相對有利。
油價和 CPI 是本周決定是否二次賣債的 trigger。若 Brent 持續在 95 美元以上，且 CPI actual 接近 swap 隱含 4.3%，Fed 很難把能源衝擊完全視為一次性；front end 會重新定價 10 月而不只 12 月。反之若 CPI 低於 4.1% 且油價回到 92 美元下方，4.55% 的 10Y 才比較可能吸引 real-money 買盤。
台幣計價海外債 ETF 的匯率換算要與利率風險拆開。CBC 台北收盤 USD/TWD 31.475，高於前一日 31.460，美元小升對未避險美元資產的 TWD NAV 有正向換算效果；但 2Y +12bp、10Y +8bp、LQD -0.6% 會抵銷部分匯率助益。因此加碼條件應是匯率換算支撐仍在、10Y 不再上破 4.60%、LQD/HYG 不再同步下跌。

sections.title: 三、其他市場動向
sections.takeaway: AI 風險資產成為利率壓力的放大器，亞洲開盤還要處理油價、FX 與政策可信度。
paragraphs: 股票端的日變動足以說明風險不是局部獲利了結。S&P 500 收 7,383.74、日跌 2.6%，Nasdaq Composite 收 25,709.43、日跌 4.2%，Nasdaq 100 收 28,957.60、日跌 4.8%，SOX 收 12,220.76、日跌 10.3%。利率上行把 AI 長久期現金流折現，晶片股又把去槓桿傳導到韓國、台灣與日本開盤。
AI 資本開支開始同時影響股權、信用與利率。Anthropic 的 350 億美元晶片融資由 Apollo / Blackstone 等結構安排，SpaceX 750 億美元 IPO 已吸引超額訂單，這些交易代表 AI growth story 需要大量外部資本。當市場同時面對高利率與巨型融資，科技股估值收縮會推高信用結構保護需求，也會增加長端資金供給壓力。
信用 proxy 顯示壓力仍溫和但方向轉防守。LQD 收 108.17、日跌 0.6%，HYG 收 79.43、日跌 0.5%，說明 IG duration 與 HY beta 都受到利率和股票波動壓制；但跌幅小於 SOX，表示現金信用尚未進入失序。配置上保留 IG carry 與結構性保護，減少長存續期 BBB 與無抵押 AI beta。
亞洲 FX 是另一個壓力面。DXY 收 100.07 後，印尼盾年內約跌 8%、曾破 18,000，韓元也被政策部門推出穩定措施，這些都不是單純美元方向，而是市場要求 EM 政策可信度與實質收益率。印尼股指距高點約 -39%、外資年內撤出債券 4.22 億美元與股票 35.6 億美元，會讓亞洲美元債的主權 beta 更難承接。
日本市場的傳導同時來自美股與 BOJ。Nikkei 期貨 63,865 低於周五現貨 66,588，SoftBank 年內漲約 70%、Kioxia 年內漲超 600% 的高 beta 將面對 Nasdaq 100 -4.8% 與 SOX -10.3% 的壓力。若 BOJ 下周升息押注繼續上升，JGB 波動會讓日企偏短端融資，全球 duration 對日本資金流的依賴度下降。
油價週末反彈使跨資產更不穩定。Brent 周五收 93.09 美元但亞洲盤回到約 95.60，美國與伊朗談判缺乏進展，航空業也因燃油成本被下修獲利預期。這條線對 FI 的意義不是只看能源股，而是看通膨預期、航空/消費信用、EM 石油補貼財政與 Fed 是否需要把供給衝擊納入政策語言。

sections.title: 四、配置含義
sections.takeaway: 先守 liquidity 與短中段 carry，再用明確 trigger 分批回補 5Y-10Y，不追高 beta。
paragraphs: Duration 的第一順位是把加碼節奏變慢，而不是全面降風險。2Y 4.17%、5Y 4.29%、10Y 4.55% 已提供比前一周更好的 carry，但 actual payrolls +172k 對 +80k 共識的 surprise 太大，CPI 前不應一次買滿。較好的做法是在 10Y 4.55%-4.60% 間分批回補 5Y-10Y，並用 CPI 低於 4.1% 或油價跌回 92 美元下方作第二段確認。 這個配置機制是把非農 surprise 先轉成 front-end repricing，再等 CPI confirmation 才增加 duration 部位。 因此，第一段配置只把利率上行傳導到分批加碼，而不是一次拉長久期。

Curve 上不宜追空 front end 也不宜過早買 long-end steepener。2s10s 38bp、5s30s 72bp 已經快速壓平，若 Fed 6 月移除降息語句，2Y 還會再受壓；但 30Y 5.01% 已接近 liability buyer 的介入區。相對可執行的是保持 belly overweight、long end small underweight，等 30Y 明確失守 5.05% 才增加 hedge。 Curve 配置機制是保留 belly carry，同時避免 long-end term premium 擴大時傷害整體 duration。

信用配置要從 beta 轉回 quality carry。LQD -0.6%、HYG -0.5% 尚未顯示信用 panic，但 Anthropic 350 億美元融資、Google-linked muni demand、Raizen 126 億美元重組與日本公司槓桿上升都提醒市場：能成交的是結構清楚、有資產或保護條款的 paper。BBB 長天期、AI 估值依賴與 EM 政策敏感債要提高 concession。 這代表信用配置需把融資供給傳導、利差保護與流動性一起評估。

台幣計價海外債 ETF 可以保留匯率換算支撐，但不能把它當作單一買進理由。USD/TWD 31.475 對 TWD NAV 是正向換算，然而 10Y +8bp、30Y 站上 5%、LQD/HYG 同跌會削弱淨值。較乾淨的加碼條件是 USD/TWD 不回落至 31.40 以下、10Y 回到 4.50%-4.55% 並穩住、信用 proxy 不再下破。 因此，ETF 部位必須把匯率支撐、利率損失與 spread beta 分開。
EM 與亞洲美元債應把 Indonesia 當作風險篩選器。印尼股市距高點 -39%、印尼盾破 18,000、外資撤出債券與股票，說明高 yield 不足以抵消政策不確定。亞洲組合可保留主權/準主權短天期 carry，但減少財政補貼、能源進口與政治干預三者重疊的風險。
現金與 liquidity buffer 應提高到能承受兩個事件窗口：6 月 10 日 CPI 與 6 月 16-17 日 FOMC。若 CPI 低於 4.1%、Brent 回到 92 美元下方、S&P 500 未跌破 7,300，才把現金轉回 belly duration 與 IG；若 CPI 高於 4.3% 或 SOX 再跌 5%，先保留短券與高流動性 ETF。

sections.title: 五、後續觀察重點
sections.takeaway: 本周 trigger 集中在 CPI、FOMC 語句、油價與亞洲政策防守，任何一項失控都會壓回 front end。
paragraphs: 第一個 trigger 是 6 月 10 日 CPI。市場已把年增約 4.3% 納入 swap，若 actual 高於 4.3% 或核心項目也加速，2Y 4.20% 會被測試，10Y 可能上看 4.65%；若 actual 低於 4.1%，5Y-10Y 才有較好的反彈條件。
第二個 trigger 是 FOMC 6 月 16-17 的聲明文字。若 Warsh 主持的首場會議移除 easing bias、強調油價二階效應與就業韌性，市場會把 10 月升息機率從約 60% 往上推；若他明確淡化單次油價衝擊，front end 才會從 4.17% 附近回落。
第三個 trigger 是 Brent 95-98 美元區間。Brent 若站上 98 美元，航空、消費與 EM 補貼財政會變成信用主線，HYG 79.0 與 LQD 108.0 可能同步被測試；若回到 92 美元下方，通膨風險溢價回落，belly duration 的風險報酬才會改善。
第四個 trigger 是亞洲 FX 與印尼政策。若 USD/IDR 不能回到 18,000 下方，或 6 月 18 日 BI 升息低於市場期待，亞洲美元債應繼續降 beta；若政策提出具體存款 remunerations、債券支持與財政約束，短天期主權/準主權才可恢復承接。
第五個 trigger 是 AI 供給與 IPO 吸金。若 SpaceX 750 億美元 IPO、Anthropic 融資與大型資料中心 deal 繼續吸收資金，而 SOX 無法守住 12,000，市場會把 AI 從 growth premium 重新定價為 funding demand。這會讓長天期 IG、私募信用與 30Y term premium 都更難快速修復。
第六個 trigger 是台幣與海外債 ETF 的淨值分解。USD/TWD 若維持 31.47 以上，匯率換算仍是正向；但若 10Y 上破 4.65% 或 LQD 跌破 108，利率/信用虧損會吃掉 FX 助益。今日台北盤應把 NAV 變動拆成匯率、UST、spread 三塊，而不是用單一美元方向判斷。

en.title: Daily FI Market Tape | 2026-06-05 close
summary: USTs bear-flattened on June 5: 2Y closed at 4.17%, up 12bp; 10Y at 4.55%, up 8bp; 30Y at 5.01%; 2s10s compressed to 38bp.
May payrolls rose 172k versus about 80k expected, unemployment held at 4.3%, and markets fully priced a 25bp year-end hike with roughly 60% odds for October.
Risk deleveraging was synchronized: S&P 500 -2.6%, Nasdaq 100 -4.8%, SOX -10.3%, DXY +0.7%, and gold -3.1%.
Positioning favors cash and short-to-intermediate carry; 5Y-10Y additions need CPI and oil confirmation, credit stays in quality IG, and TWD bond ETFs must separate FX translation from rates losses.

headline.primary: Hotter hiring pulls the Fed back toward hike-tail pricing and pressures long-duration assets
headline.secondary: 2Y 4.17%, 10Y 4.55%, NDX -4.8%, SOX -10.3%; CPI is the next line between another rates selloff and belly repair.

regime_strip.label: Rates
regime_strip.value: Front end reprices the jobs surprise

regime_strip.label: Risk
regime_strip.value: AI beta is the deleveraging channel

regime_strip.label: Oil
regime_strip.value: Friday relief gives way to weekend tension

positioning.label: Duration
positioning.best_expression: Allocate with staged 5Y-10Y duration adds; avoid chasing 30Y before CPI.
positioning.risk_trigger: Stop adding if 10Y breaks 4.65% or CPI exceeds 4.3%.

positioning.label: Curve
positioning.best_expression: Keep a curve allocation of belly overweight and small long-end underweight.
positioning.risk_trigger: 30Y above 5.05% means term premium pressure is extending.

positioning.label: Credit
positioning.best_expression: Prefer IG carry, shorter duration, and protected paper in credit allocation.
positioning.risk_trigger: Reduce beta if HYG breaks 79 or LQD breaks 108.

positioning.label: TWD ETF
positioning.view: FX translation support with rates offsets
positioning.best_expression: Use only small staged ETF allocation and split FX translation, UST duration, and spreads.
positioning.risk_trigger: Pause if USD/TWD returns below 31.40 or 10Y breaks 4.65%.

positioning.label: Asia / EM
positioning.best_expression: Keep Asia EM allocation in short-dated sovereign or quasi-sovereign carry only.
positioning.risk_trigger: De-risk if USD/IDR stays above 18,000 and BI under-delivers.

driver_decomposition.fi_impact: The surprise lifted 2Y-5Y and removed support for the cut narrative.

driver_decomposition.signal: This week CPI swaps imply about 4.3% y/y.
driver_decomposition.fi_impact: A print near that level can extend 10Y from 4.55% toward 4.65%.
Higher discount rates hit growth equity, long-duration credit, and IPO funding capacity.

driver_decomposition.signal: Brent $93.09 on Friday, near $95.60 in Asia after weekend headlines.
driver_decomposition.fi_impact: Energy pressure extends inflation risk and limits long-end rallies.
Dollar strength supports TWD NAV translation but can be offset by UST and credit losses.

driver_decomposition.signal: Indonesian stocks about -39% from high; rupiah about -8% YTD.
driver_decomposition.fi_impact: Weak policy credibility raises EM spread and real-yield requirements.

key_levels.label: 10Y UST
key_levels.why_it_matters: It controls whether belly duration can be added.

key_levels.label: 30Y UST
key_levels.why_it_matters: Long IG and ultra-long duration are most sensitive.

key_levels.label: SOX
key_levels.why_it_matters: A break would pressure Asia tech and credit beta.

key_levels.label: USD/TWD
key_levels.why_it_matters: It is the FX translation base for TWD overseas-bond ETFs.

event_risks.label: U.S. CPI June 10
event_risks.why_it_matters: Above 4.3% hurts 2Y and 10Y; below 4.1% helps the belly.

event_risks.label: FOMC June 16-17
event_risks.why_it_matters: The easing-bias language is the front-end trigger.

event_risks.label: BOJ next week
event_risks.why_it_matters: JGB volatility affects global duration demand.

event_risks.label: BI June 18
event_risks.why_it_matters: Indonesia is the policy credibility test for Asia credit beta.

event_risks.label: AI capital supply
event_risks.why_it_matters: Large funding deals affect credit supply and equity liquidity.

asia_update.label: Japan open
asia_update.why_it_matters: U.S. tech weakness feeds Japan equities and credit.

asia_update.label: Indonesia
asia_update.value: stocks about -39% from high; rupiah breached 18,000
asia_update.why_it_matters: EM local confidence is the main Asia debt tail risk.

asia_update.label: Korea
asia_update.value: won pressure after AI-heavy KOSPI rally
asia_update.why_it_matters: Tech beta and FX defense are linked.

asia_update.label: Taiwan lens
asia_update.why_it_matters: ETF NAV needs to split FX support from tech and rates pressure.

rows.label: S&P 500
rows.note: Higher discount rates hit valuation and ended the attempted tenth weekly gain.

rows.label: Nasdaq Composite
rows.note: AI and long-duration growth became the main rates transmission channel.

rows.label: Nasdaq 100
rows.note: Largest fall since April 2025; a clear risk deleveraging signal.

rows.label: SOX
rows.note: Semiconductors absorbed the strongest AI capex and rates shock.

rows.label: Dow
rows.note: Defensive and value rotation cushioned the index but did not offset rates.

rows.label: DXY
rows.note: Wider U.S. yield advantage raised Asia FX and EM funding pressure.

rows.label: USD/TWD
rows.note: The onshore Taiwan close gives FX translation support to TWD NAV, while rates and credit remain separate offsets.

rows.label: Brent
rows.note: Friday close was lower, but weekend Iran-Israel headlines lifted Asia trading near $95.60.

rows.label: Gold
rows.note: Higher real yields and a stronger dollar overwhelmed haven demand.

rows.label: Credit Proxy
rows.note: IG duration and HY beta both weakened; quality and shorter duration remain preferred.

rows.label: U.S. payrolls
rows.note: The beat moved Fed pricing back toward hike optionality and hit 2Y-5Y hardest.

rows.label: U.S. wages
rows.expected: near prior; market focus is whether inflation again exceeds wages
rows.note: Wages were not disorderly, but CPI now decides front-end follow-through.

rows.label: U.S. CPI
rows.value: due June 10; swaps imply about 4.3% y/y
rows.expected: near the highest since 2023; prior below the implied level
rows.note: A print near 4.3% would keep 10Y 4.55% from looking like a durable ceiling.

rows.label: Fed pricing
rows.value: 25bp hike by year-end fully priced; October about 60%
rows.expected: June meeting still likely on hold
rows.note: The first Warsh meeting is a credibility test for the front end.

rows.label: Canada jobs
rows.note: Canada 2Y rose about 10bp, confirming a global front-end demand test.

rows.label: Indonesia policy
rows.value: stocks about -39% from high; rupiah about -8% YTD and breached 18,000
rows.expected: BI June 18; market debates more than 50bp, some expect 75bp
rows.note: EM local debt needs higher real yield and stronger policy credibility.

rows.label: Japan policy
rows.value: Nikkei futures 63,865 vs spot 66,588; BOJ hike bets rose
rows.note: U.S. rates plus JGB volatility make global duration buyers more selective.

rows.label: AI / credit supply
rows.value: Anthropic chip financing $35bn; SpaceX IPO target $75bn
rows.expected: AI capex and mega IPO supply keep absorbing capital
rows.note: AI affects private credit, IG alternatives, and long-end term premium, not only equities.

sections.title: UST close and curve moves
sections.takeaway: USTs delivered a payroll-driven bear flattening, with front-end hike risk back in the price and the long end still constrained by oil and supply.
paragraphs: Paragraph 1: The rates close was a payroll-driven bear flattening, with 2Y at 4.17%, 10Y at 4.55%, 30Y at 5.01%, and 2s10s compressed to 38bp; the portfolio implication is to slow duration adds until CPI confirms the inflation path.

Paragraph 2: The rates close was a payroll-driven bear flattening, with 2Y at 4.17%, 10Y at 4.55%, 30Y at 5.01%, and 2s10s compressed to 38bp; the portfolio implication is to slow duration adds until CPI confirms the inflation path.

sections.title: UST interpretation
sections.takeaway: The Fed reaction function has shifted from waiting for cuts to testing inflation credibility, making the belly more actionable than the long end.
paragraphs: Paragraph 1: The Fed path moved from a cut debate toward hike-tail pricing after payrolls rose 172k versus about 80k expected, making 5Y-10Y the cleaner trading bucket than the long end before CPI and FOMC.

Paragraph 2: The Fed path moved from a cut debate toward hike-tail pricing after payrolls rose 172k versus about 80k expected, making 5Y-10Y the cleaner trading bucket than the long end before CPI and FOMC.

sections.title: Other market moves
sections.takeaway: AI risk assets became the amplifier for rates pressure, while Asia also has to absorb oil, FX, and policy credibility risk.
paragraphs: Paragraph 1: Cross-asset pressure was concentrated in AI beta, with Nasdaq 100 down 4.8%, SOX down 10.3%, DXY at 100.07, and Brent rebounding near 95.60 in Asia; this keeps equity duration, credit beta, and Asia FX linked.

sections.title: Allocation implications
sections.takeaway: Keep liquidity and short-to-intermediate carry first, then add 5Y-10Y only with explicit CPI and oil triggers.
paragraphs: Paragraph 1: Allocation favors cash, short-to-intermediate carry, staged 5Y-10Y duration, quality IG credit, and small TWD USD-bond ETF adds only when FX translation support is not offset by UST and spread losses.

Paragraph 2: Allocation favors cash, short-to-intermediate carry, staged 5Y-10Y duration, quality IG credit, and small TWD USD-bond ETF adds only when FX translation support is not offset by UST and spread losses.

sections.title: Watchlist
sections.takeaway: This week is about CPI, FOMC language, oil, and Asia policy defense; any failure pushes pressure back into the front end.
paragraphs: Paragraph 1: The watchlist is CPI near 4.3%, FOMC language, Brent in the 95-98 zone, Indonesia policy credibility, AI funding supply, and Taiwan ETF attribution, with each trigger tied to front-end, credit, or risk-control decisions.
